Lots of apple trees line this park. Will return in fall. Access: Public.
Found a single apple on one of these trees. Flavor okay, mostly still green. Recommend coming back in fall. Other trees around. Access: Public.
Large lovely black cherry tree hanging over sidewalk. I grab a handful as I walk by. So sweet and delicious. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Wild black berry bushes all along the trail. Frost grapes too, not ready yet. Access: Public.
